category_sources: source_facts.description says it prints Qur'an chapters and verses in the terminal; official quran-go page says it reads Qur'an in the terminal.

docs_sources: Official source-control project page and README link are the best official documentation surface found.

tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Qur'an chapters and verses in terminal; source_facts.executables lists quran.
